title: mentha × rotundifolia var. neglecta
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia var. neglecta, also known as Corn Mint or Round-leaved Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia var. neglecta include relieving digestive problems, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from headaches and fever. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
